title: 0x79 — URL Shortener
lead: Free URL shortener with custom alias, password, expiry and burn-after clicks.
preview_hint: Show a preview bar before redirecting. Visitors can still open the target directly.
upload_lead: Upload images or ZIP files and get a short share link.
file_hint: Allowed: JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, AVIF, ZIP. Max 25 MB. SVG is blocked.
paste_lead: Share text, logs or code snippets. Optional password, expiry and burn-after views.
paste_hint: Plain text only. Max 200 KB. Raw URL available at /raw/code.
err_save: could not save. please try again.
err_burned: this link has reached its click limit.
err_alias: invalid alias. only A–Z, a–z, 0–9, max 32 chars.
err_rate_limit: rate limit reached. please try again later.
err_file_type: file type not allowed. allowed: JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, AVIF, ZIP.
abuse_text: Found a link used for phishing, malware or spam? Report it here.
api_card_text: Full REST API for creating short links, uploading files and creating pastes.
music_lead: One short link for Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, SoundCloud, Deezer, TIDAL and more. Links are verified against official domains.
home_h1: URL shortener, file host, paste, music & more.
home_lead: Six tools, one clean interface. Guests expire after 14 days — accounts keep and manage their own content.
home_ticker: short links — file hosting — private pastes — clean metadata — music pages — encrypted sharing —
home_directory_lead: Links, files and private sharing in one place.
home_tool1_desc: Short links with custom alias, password, expiry and burn-after clicks.
home_tool2_desc: Upload images or ZIP files and get a short share link. SVG and executables stay blocked.
home_tool3_desc: Share text, logs or snippets with password, expiry and burn-after views.
home_tool4_desc: One promo link for Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music and more — platform links verified.
home_tool5_desc: Upload images to strip EXIF & location metadata directly in your browser.
home_tool6_desc: Encrypt text client-side via AES-GCM and share it as a zero-knowledge link.
home_showcase_lead: Turn a release into a focused landing page with cover art, artist details and verified links for Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube and more.
news_lead: Stay informed about current threats, security tips and updates.
